name: memory_test
creator: elnix91
description: A simple memory test. You play using the arrows keys. A suite of directions (colors: Left=red; Up=blue; Down=green; Right=purple) appear and then, you have to repeat it in the exact order. If you fail on a single color, you lose and you get your score. If you are on Omega or Upsilon, your best score is automatically saved in a file named “mt.sav” Don’t hesitate to tell me if you find any bug on discord (@elnix91) or by mail: elnix91@gmail.com
